caption: A man wearing a long-sleeved blue shirt is seated at a keyboard in a studio setting with dark purple curtains in the background. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm. To his left, a guitar leans against the wall, and a trumpet stands nearby. Small plush toys are perched atop a speaker and other equipment behind him. In the initial sequence, the man is gesturing with both hands while speaking or singing into the microphone. As the scene progresses, he lowers his hands and begins playing the keys of the keyboard. The camera remains stationary throughout, focusing on the man from the waist up, while the lighting remains consistent, casting a purple hue over the background. No text or logos are visible on the screen.
